S.FORM: = Wahi ssama = Wahi ssama nii o tduwa tminun , saw ka qwarux msa.
S.PHON: = waħi ssama = waħi ssama nii o tduwa tminun , saw ka qwaɾux msa.

S.PHON: = waħi ssama = waħi ssama nii o tduwa tminun , saw ka qwaɾux msa.
